# 🔧 Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to **SmartSecure: IoT-Based Intelligent Home Automation System**.

Please fill out the following details to help us review your contribution efficiently.

---

# 📋 Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the changes introduced in this pull request.

Example:
- Added support for new sensor
- Improved gas detection logic
- Fixed relay switching issue

---

# 🚀 Type of Change

Please check the appropriate option.

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Code improvement / refactoring
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Other (please specify)

---

# 🧪 Testing

Describe how you tested your changes.

Examples:
- Tested on Arduino R4 WiFi hardware
- Verified sensor readings using serial monitor
- Tested Bluetooth communication with mobile app

---

# 📸 Screenshots / Demo (Optional)

If applicable, add screenshots or demonstration images.

Example:

```
images/demo_feature.png
```

Or add a video link.

---

# 🧠 Related Issue

If this pull request resolves an issue, link it here.

Example:

```
Fixes #12
```

---

# 📁 Files Modified

List the major files changed in this pull request.

Example:

```
firmware/sensor_monitoring/dht11_monitoring.ino
firmware/appliance_control/relay_control.ino
docs/system_architecture.png
```

---

# ⚙ Hardware Used for Testing

Mention the hardware used while testing.

Example:

- Arduino R4 WiFi
- DHT11 Sensor
- MQ-2 Gas Sensor
- Relay Module

---

# ✔ Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting.

- [ ] Code follows the project structure
- [ ] Code is properly commented
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if needed)
- [ ] Tested on hardware or simulation
- [ ] No unnecessary files added

---

# 💬 Additional Notes

Add any extra information that may help reviewers understand your changes.

---

Thank you for contributing to this project! 🚀
